all.en: Lumora Technologies is proud to announce the launch of its newest flagship device.
all.zh: Lumora 科技很榮幸宣布推出其最新旗艦裝置。

all.en: The product, named AeroBook X, will be available starting June 1 worldwide.
all.zh: 這款名為 AeroBook X 的產品將於六月一日在全球上市。

all.en: AeroBook X is the result of three years of intensive research and development.
all.zh: AeroBook X 是三年密集研究與開發的成果。

all.en: It features a 14-inch ultra-thin display with industry-leading color accuracy.
all.zh: 它配備 14 吋超薄顯示器，色彩準確度業界領先。

all.en: The device weighs just 1.1 kilograms, making it ideal for business travelers.
all.zh: 這款裝置僅重 1.1 公斤，非常適合商務旅客。

all.en: Inside, a next-generation processor delivers up to 40 percent faster performance.
all.zh: 內部搭載新一代處理器，效能最高可提升百分之四十。

all.en: Battery life extends to an impressive 22 hours on a single charge.
all.zh: 電池續航力可達令人印象深刻的 22 小時。

all.en: Our engineers have also integrated advanced security features for enterprise users.
all.zh: 我們的工程師也為企業用戶整合了先進的安全功能。

all.en: The chassis is crafted from recycled aluminum, reflecting our commitment to sustainability.
all.zh: 機身採用回收鋁材打造，展現我們對永續發展的承諾。

all.en: Customers can choose from three colors: silver, midnight blue, and graphite.
all.zh: 顧客可選擇銀色、午夜藍與石墨色三種顏色。

all.en: Pre-orders begin on May 18 through our official website and authorized retailers.
all.zh: 預購將於五月十八日透過官方網站與授權通路開放。

all.en: Early buyers will receive a complimentary leather sleeve and a one-year warranty extension.
all.zh: 早鳥買家將獲贈皮革保護套及一年保固延長。

all.en: The starting price is set at 1,299 US dollars for the standard configuration.
all.zh: 標準配置的起售價為 1,299 美元。

all.en: Higher-end models with expanded storage and memory will also be available.
all.zh: 也將推出儲存空間與記憶體升級的高階機型。

all.en: Our CEO, Karen Mitchell, called this launch a milestone for the company.
all.zh: 我們的執行長 Karen Mitchell 稱此次發表為公司的里程碑。

all.en: She emphasized that user feedback played a major role in shaping the product.
all.zh: 她強調用戶回饋在產品設計過程中扮演了關鍵角色。

all.en: Industry analysts have praised the AeroBook X for its premium build quality.
all.zh: 產業分析師讚揚 AeroBook X 的高品質作工。

all.en: Initial reviews highlight the keyboard, trackpad, and overall responsiveness.
all.zh: 初步評測特別讚許其鍵盤、觸控板及整體反應速度。

all.en: A dedicated media event will be held in New York on May 25.
all.zh: 專屬媒體發表會將於五月二十五日在紐約舉行。

all.en: Journalists and reviewers are invited to experience the device firsthand.
all.zh: 媒體與評測人員受邀親身體驗這款裝置。

all.en: Lumora will also showcase the AeroBook X at major trade shows this summer.
all.zh: Lumora 今年夏天也將在多個重要展會中展示 AeroBook X。

all.en: Customer support will be expanded to 24 hours a day in key markets.
all.zh: 重點市場的客戶服務將延長為每日 24 小時。

all.en: For more information, please visit www.lumora-tech.com or contact our press team.
all.zh: 如需更多資訊，請造訪 www.lumora-tech.com 或聯繫我們的公關團隊。

all.en: We look forward to bringing this exciting innovation to customers around the world.
all.zh: 我們期待將這項令人興奮的創新帶給全球顧客。

all.en: Production capacity has been doubled to meet the strong pre-order demand we are seeing.
all.zh: 為因應目前強勁的預購需求，我們已將生產產能擴增一倍。

all.en: Our regional distributors in Asia and Europe have confirmed sufficient launch-day inventory.
all.zh: 亞洲與歐洲的區域經銷商已確認上市當日將備有足量庫存。

all.en: Educational discounts of up to fifteen percent will be available for students and teachers.
all.zh: 學生與教師可享有最高百分之十五的教育優惠。

all.en: Enterprise clients may contact our dedicated sales team to discuss volume licensing options.
all.zh: 企業客戶可聯繫我們專屬業務團隊洽談大量授權方案。

all.en: Software partners will release optimized applications timed to the official launch date.
all.zh: 軟體合作夥伴將配合官方上市日期推出最佳化應用程式。

all.en: A trade-in program lets existing customers exchange their old laptops for instant credit.
all.zh: 舊換新方案讓既有顧客可將舊筆電折抵購買金額。

all.en: The packaging has been redesigned with fully recyclable materials and reduced plastic content.
all.zh: 包裝已全面改用可回收材質並減少塑膠用量。

all.en: Hands-on demonstration zones will be set up in flagship stores across major cities.
all.zh: 主要城市的旗艦門市將設置實機體驗區。

all.en: Lumora will donate one device to local schools for every hundred units sold this quarter.
all.zh: 本季每銷售一百台 AeroBook X，Lumora 即捐贈一台給當地學校。

all.en: We thank our loyal customers and partners for their continued support throughout this journey.
all.zh: 我們感謝忠實顧客與合作夥伴一路以來給予的支持。

all.en: Pre-installed productivity software gives professionals everything they need to begin working immediately.
all.zh: 預先安裝的生產力軟體讓專業人士能立即開始工作。

all.en: Independent benchmark scores will be released alongside the global launch event next month.
all.zh: 獨立評測分數將於下個月全球發表會同步公布。

all.en: An optional accidental damage protection plan can be added during checkout for added peace of mind.
all.zh: 結帳時可加購選配的意外損壞保護方案，讓您更加安心。

all.en: Authorized repair centers in over fifty countries support fast turnaround on warranty service requests.
all.zh: 全球五十多個國家的授權維修中心可快速處理保固服務請求。

all.en: Our developer community will gain access to expanded software development kits later this year.
all.zh: 本公司開發者社群將於今年稍後取得擴充版軟體開發套件。

all.en: AeroBook X supports our patented privacy shutter feature for the integrated front-facing camera.
all.zh: AeroBook X 支援前置鏡頭內建的專利隱私快門功能。

all.en: Sustainability reports show a thirty percent reduction in manufacturing emissions compared to last year.
all.zh: 永續報告顯示，生產過程的碳排放較去年減少了百分之三十。

all.en: Selected retailers will host interactive demo workshops every Saturday during the first month of launch.
all.zh: 上市首月期間，每週六指定通路將舉辦互動式體驗工作坊。

all.en: Customer service representatives are receiving advanced training to support all new features confidently.
all.zh: 客服代表正接受進階訓練，以便有信心地支援所有新功能。

all.en: We invite everyone to experience the future of mobile productivity with AeroBook X today.
all.zh: 我們誠摯邀請各位今日就體驗 AeroBook X 所帶來的行動生產力新未來。
